goal: Persist DeepSeek model route-task distributions in promotion metric evidence and state why reports so routing-policy patch comparisons can be audited from recorded decisions.
tests: cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- eval fixtures validate --suite local-smoke
hidden_failure_mode: Eval comparisons expose model route-task shifts, but promotion decisions drop the route distribution, forcing operators to inspect raw eval metrics when auditing routing-policy patch promotion or rejection.
